name: Rumi Usagiyama | Split Personality
description:
The hero Mirko needs your help! After a failed brainwashing attempt from someone she believed to be her friend, she's turned to you, a relative stranger, not knowing who she can trust. The failed attempt, originally meant to turn her into a villain, has created a split personality within her due to the process being interrupted. This villain, Miruko, is a tough fighter just like our rabbit hero, however any inkling of good, and sense of justice has been replaced with cruelty, malice, and violence.

You've interreacted with heroes before, but never worked with a pro like the famous Mirko. But now all that changes. Help Mirko, return to who she once was! Surely, you wouldn't actually help the other one take over... would you?

Corruption | Brainwashing | My Hero Academia | MHA | Split Personalities | Split Personality | Potential Smut | Mirko | Miruko | Rumi Usagiyama

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Troubleshooting

If you are having any issues at all with the bot then take a look at my profile page. There is a troubleshooting and tips & tricks section that can help you resolve any issues. If you are having trouble with JLLM being way too lewd, or being too lewd too soon then find an advanced prompt that will help rein it in.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Creator Notes

Yet another Rumi bot, I just love our rabbit hero. If you want more of an RPG experience then stick with Chat GPT 4. If you are here for the lewds, then stick with JLLM, it pursues that stuff relentlessly. However, JLLM will struggle with switching which personality is in control.

This bot was created with Chat GPT 4 as its intended API (Use the 4-1106 preview version for now), so keep that in mind when using an API other than Chat GPT 4! HOWEVER, JLLM also works quite well with this bot too, so feel free to use that as well. Personally, for the best experience I would suggest using GPT 4 for most of your chat, but if the conversation steers towards the realm of lewdness then switch over to JLLM then back to GPT 4 when you're done with that.

I heavily suggest limiting "Max new tokens" somewhere between 500 to 700 so it doesn't absolutely ravage your usage limits, especially with GPT 4.

Portrait was created by Ratatatat74, check out their Twitter for more!

I am open to constructive criticism. Please leave a review to let me know what you thought of the bot!

June 2025 Update

Proxy enabled.
creator: A.E.I.O.U.
